title: thelypteris laterepens
intro: Thelypteris laterepens, also known as the lateral maiden fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta, characterized by its distinctive fronds and reproductive structures. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris laterepens have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
